ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) of the beer */,
  "ibu" REAL /* International Bitterness Unit (IBU) of the beer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the beer */,
  "ounces" INTEGER /* Size of the beer in ounces */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe used for the beer */,
  "brewery_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery location where the beer is produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the beer was produced */,
  "best_before_date" TEXT /* Date by which the beer should be consumed for best quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES beer_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_brewery_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_location_id") REFERENCES brewery_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the style */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* A metric indicating the popularity of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the ingredient */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of the ingredient per unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_ingredients" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the beer */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewing_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the process in minutes */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_brewing_processes" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewing process */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the brewing process was used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the brewing process */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the brewing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id", "process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery location where the beer is stored */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer sold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the beer was sold */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order for the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the customer after the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_customers" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the sale */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewer, sales staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (should be hashed) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery location */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_notes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES brewery_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery location where the sale occurred */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average price at which the beer was sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sales trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES brewery_locations ("location_id")
)
